zh.Stixwould, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯沃爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulf II de Gernon於1100年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Ranulf Meschin31歲，母親Lucy of Bolingbroke34歲。他於1141年與Maud of Gloucester在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1153年12月16日在英國爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國爾切斯特。

zh-hans.Stixwould, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾斯沃爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulf II de Gernon于1100年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Ranulf Meschin31岁，母亲Lucy of Bolingbroke34岁。他于1141年与Maud of Gloucester在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1153年12月16日在英国爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: Ranulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, Reginulfr, derived from regin ‘advice, decision’ + úlfr ‘wolf’. This was introduced into Scotland and northern England by Scandinavian settlers in the early Middle Ages and modern use is largely confined to these areas.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulf II de Gernon was born in 1100, in Normandy, France, his father, Ranulf Meschin, was 31 and his mother, Lucy of Bolingbroke, was 34. He married Maud of Gloucester in 1141, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 16 December 1153, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulf II de Gernon est né en 1100, à Normandie, France, son père, Ranulf Meschin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lucy of Bolingbroke, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Maud of Gloucester en 1141, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1153, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulf II de Gernon 1100 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulf Meschin 31 und seine Mutter Lucy of Bolingbroke 34. Er hat 1141 in Gloucestershire, England Maud of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1153 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Cheshire, England und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

ht.Cantref of Cyfeiliog, Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf II de Gernon è nato il nel 1100 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ranulf Meschin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lucy of Bolingbroke, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Maud of Gloucester nel 1141, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 16 dicembre 1153, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Chester, Cheshire, England.

ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Ranulf II de Gernonが1100年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Ranulf Meschinは31歳，母Lucy of Bolingbrokeは34歳であった。1141年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでMaud of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1153年12月16日にイギリスチェシュアイアで53歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulf II de Gernon(이)가 1100년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulf Meschin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy of Bolingbroke(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1141년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Maud of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1153년 12월 16일 영국 체실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

mg.Cantref of Cyfeiliog, Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf II de Gernon nasceu em 1100, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Ranulf Meschin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lucy of Bolingbroke, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud of Gloucester em 1141, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1153, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulf II de Gernon родился в 1100 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ranulf Meschin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lucy of Bolingbroke, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud of Gloucester в 1141 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 16 декабря 1153 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности честир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulf II de Gernon nació en 1100, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ranulf Meschin, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lucy of Bolingbroke, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Maud of Gloucester en 1141, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1153, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
